title: Tahikem 6 Set Garage Hooks, Utility Ladder Hooks 7 Inch / 18cm Long, Black Garage Storage Tool Hooks, Heavy Duty Large Wall Mounts Hanger Brackets, Outdoor Indoor Bike Chair Hose Storage - H20 X L18cm
features: 【 PACKAGE & BEARING CAPACITY 】6 sets 7 Inch “J” type wall mount garage hooks + 6 extension cord holder organizer, more convenient for you to store some hoses and wires. Garage storage hook size is 7 Inch x 7-7/8 Inch (18cm x 20cm). The diameter of the round tube steel is 5/8 inch (1.6cm). The maximum load-bearing capacity is 30 pounds (13.5KG).

【 QUALITY MATERIAL & EVA ARM 】Round tube steel and no welding process make the wall mount garage hooks strong. The black non-slip EVA arm is useful for fixing objects, protecting the surface from scratches or damage, and preventing the ladders(Mower/Ski board/folding chair/etc.) from slipping off.

【 EASY TO INSTALL 】This Tahikem heavy duty storage hooks can be installed on plaster, wooden, brick and concrete walls. Only 3 steps to complete the installation: 1) Drill 2 holes in the wall. 2) Use a hammer to knock the yellow plastic bolts into the hole. 3) Use an electric drill to fix the screws and garage storage hook into the plastic bolts.(Package comes with screws and plastic anchors )

【 PERFECT STORAGE FOR LARGE ITEMS 】 This wall mount garage hooks can save more space for your garage, garden and warehouse. High-quality storage hooks can hold a variety of large tools, suitable for storage of large items such as folded chairs, Ladders, bicycles, garden hoses, lumber and wood.

【100% Satisfaction】 Our heavy duty hanging hooks are made of round steel tube, which is strong and durable, and the black powder coating can guarantee no rust for 5 years. In addition, if you are not satisfied with your purchase, please contact us by email, we will reply you within 24 hours, we promise free replacement or refund for any problem.
description: Ultra-Sturdy Garage Hooks Made of high quality metal, these garage hooks are sturdy enough to lift over 30 pounds(13.5KG). It can hold shovels, brooms, hoses, hoses, bikes, ladders and other bulk items, and the EVA non-slip coating will keep hanging items intact. Easy to Install& Bearing Capacity These garage hooks are suitable for plaster, wood, brick, and concrete walls. Different types of walls have different load-bearing capacities; (1) Mark the position on the ceiling with a marker; (2) Then punch holes with a percussion drill; (2) Put the yellow plastic anchor bolt into the hole; (3) Fasten the screw and hook into the anchor. Color: Black Size: L 7"(18cm) x H 7-7/8"(29cm) x Φ 5/8"(1.6cm) Package Included - 6 x 7" Heavy duty garage storage Hooks - 12 x Screws - 12 x Plastic anchor - 6 x Extension cord holder organizer CUSTOMER SUPPORT - About the product, if you have any question and need support, please send us an email, we will reply your request within 24 hours, if you don't like it within a month, we promise a refund, why not try it?
